title: When I Was Your Man
why_this_song: When I Was Your Man by Bruno Mars (2012) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 4 times; first heard in: "'Cause my heart breaks a little when I hear your name"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "That I should've bought you flowers"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Take you to every party"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Now my baby's dancing"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "That I should've bought you flowers"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: It all just sounds like ooh-ooh, ooh-ooh
Mmm, too young, too dumb to realize
That I should've bought you flowers
But she's dancing with another man
My pride, my ego, my needs, and my selfish ways
Caused a good strong woman like you to walk out my life

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "cause" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "cause" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "should've" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "should've" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: It all just sounds like ooh-ooh, ooh-ooh
Mmm, too young, too dumb to realize
To try and apologize for my mistakes

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "When I Was Your Man", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "When I Was Your Man", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "When I Was Your Man" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "When I Was Your Man" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "When I Was Your Man" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "When I Was Your Man", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
